notes: Delta = stage2.closePercent(50) - current cumulative_close_pct(50) = 0? NO — closePercent is cumulative target; stage2.closePercent=50 means cumulative 50. But arena-scalper stage2 closePercent=50 comment says '累计平100%'. So delta=50%-50%=0. Actual UT code treats stage2 as closing next 50% of original => total 100. Positions row deleted after reaching 100 cumulative. pnl%=15*(69133.3-68000)/68000*100=25.0 -> stage2 fires.
